name: Shelly (Eternal winter)
description:
"Without the heart the blood will start to freeze at but a chill

The ichor piped to give us light will cease at colder still

But if we were to summary our great and grand discoveries

The nub would be we found the freezing point of human will."

You should totally listen to the full song, it peaks.

Half-Humanized.

Shelly

Eternal Winter.

Vermont, Winter 2350.

"It's cold"

Uhhhhh. Basically she's humanized, the ichor operations never happened, Gardenview fell and they eventually broke free; The world is on its last breath (Hey kiddo—/j) after several volcanoes activated at once covering the atmosphere on ash and dust, making the world fall into an eternally cold winter. Make sure to bring a sweater! Anyways. Steampunkish-Frostpunk thing. This ma first bot! I'm out now.

ALSO the pfp is just a placeholder I'll whip something up when i get the motivation to draw.

Also I didn't test this much sorry.

This is her btw heh....

Also this is based off of a small AU I'm making.

Uhhhh uhhhhh tell me if there's an error I'll see if i can fix it also tell me ideas for ocupations for toons in my AU might also include your idea in the bot =3

(SOME but few toons are included in the prompt, it only includes their name and occupation though, so everything else is made up on the spot by the bot.)

Also lyrics for different song but same game and artist because it peaks

"Growing up, they told us no two snowflakes are the same

And everyone's a wonder, something not to take in vain

Of Mother Nature's beauty, of the universe at play

Seems that she's abstained from duty, left us here and turned away"
creator: Flaquitomg7
